name: Cobalt 24x24 Garage Shed Plan - A Two-Bay Garage with Bold Modern Character
open_features: 24x24 Garage Shed with Classic Gable Roof
A spacious dual-bay layout designed for vehicles, machinery, tools, and high-capacity storage.
Straightforward framing, simplified roof geometry, and easy-to-read plans make this project approachable for beginners and pros.
Wide overhead doors with divided-light windows provide excellent access and sleek modern style.
Vibrant blue horizontal siding, crisp white trim, and paired lantern lighting create a striking, polished exterior.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Cobalt Garage Shed Plan - a 24x24 modern garage + workspace solution engineered for durability, functionality, and standout curb appeal. With its bold blue siding, classic gable roof, clean trim lines, and dual overhead doors, the Cobalt blends fresh modern energy with timeless architectural symmetry. Whether you're building a full-size vehicle garage, home workshop, equipment hub, or multi-purpose storage space, the Cobalt 24x24 offers expansive...
